Trucidation  

Description

1: Decrease Hitpoints by 1500.

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 375 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 3.2 Recast Time: 900
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Magic
Resist Adjust: -200 Range: 200
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Deletable: No Reflectable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Target Type: Lifetap
Spell Type: Detrimental Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Your essence drains away.
Cast on other: Soandso seems drained.

Game Description

Drains your target of life energy, siphoning between 1500 and @1 hit points. Consumes an essence emerald when cast.

Reagents

  • Essence Emerald x 1

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Trucidation

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Trucidation
ClassLevel
NEC60
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (7)
  • Sold By (1)
  • Dropped By (17)
  • Crafted (1)
  • NPCs with Ability (1)
  • Screenshots
  • Spell: Trucidation - Research 222

Merchants:


The Plane of Knowledge
  • Heretic Edalith - 118pp 8gp 8sp 9cp
Post Comment
usage
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2008 at 12:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591863387220
83 posts
i figure there is only one real use for this spell..
You know that mob you have to kill, but cant....Burn a few EE's and tap the bugger to death.
▲ Page top
usage
QuoteReply
# Mar 25 2008 at 4:43 PM Rating: Default
SSJGhol
View User Forum
255 posts
Not with a reuse time of 15mins, this just an emergency heal/nuke for the necro.
▲ Page top
spell
QuoteReply
# May 28 2006 at 10:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344213095
3 posts
sky fire wurm guarden droped it too
▲ Page top
spell
QuoteReply
# May 28 2006 at 10:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344213095
3 posts
sky fire wurm guarden droped it too
▲ Page top
lifetap
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2004 at 2:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592763806772
346 posts
its only about 400 for hp then last lifedrain, it does cost less mana, but youve got plenty of mana regen, not EEs. I'd rather just cast last lifedrain twice if I want alot of hp drain. Save myself the EE.
▲ Page top
Useless indeed
QuoteReply
# Jan 22 2003 at 11:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774826667
12 posts
Yes this spell is not worth the trouble at all..EE are a thing of the past only use is rezz or course but i for one never have trouble finding a rezz in the spots i hunt, ME, Grey etc :) if this was a CH that wasnt resisted at all then it would be it would be worth the trouble (lich down to less then 5%, CH back and tadada!) other then that its junk unless this spells given to you dont seek it at all.
▲ Page top
what a waste of a spell slot
QuoteReply
# Jan 06 2003 at 1:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591785063570
30 posts
the ONLY thing this spell was good for was back before they changed the way focus items worked with crit nukes. i had Mask of the Dragon Slayer, for the sole purpose of huge lifetaps, and when it would crit nuke it would calculate the extra damage off the entire crit.. the damage of the spell x2. so on a 720pt lifetap, it would crit for 1440.. and the damage focus would use THAT number as a reference to determine how much extra it tacked on. so id get 1700pt crits sometimes off it. now, it uses the base damage of the spell, so i got mid 1500's if i was lucky after the change.

consequentally this sepll critted for 2600 for me once, and even having Neurotoxin crit for me, its still my highest to date. now its completely devoid of entertainment factor AND usefulness. id never spend an EE just to get life back that fast. if im that low of health, id rather take my chances with FD, and if i die use the EE to rez myself.
▲ Page top
